title: Best Rap Album Nominees - The GRAMMYs 2026
text: New Industry Focus reports on the 2026 Grammy Best Rap Album nominees and category details. The Recording Academy revealed the five nominees for Best Rap Album at the 2026 Grammy Awards: Kendrick Lamar (GNX), Tyler, The Creator (CHROMAKOPIA), Clipse (Let God Sort Em Out), GloRilla (GLORIOUS), and JID (God Does Like Ugly). Notable Details: Three of the five nominees came out in 2024, which aligns with patterns seen in previous Grammy ceremonies. The awards ceremony was held on February 1, 2026. Kendrick Lamar arrived as a particularly strong contender, having submitted entries across multiple categories following his prominent cultural moment in hip-hop. The category features diverse approaches to rap, from traditional lyrical excellence to experimental production and commercial dominance.
